prospect.Summary: Utterly dominant as both a sophomore and junior at Oral Roberts, Denton is a low-slot reliever with mid-90s heat and tail. He sports a lateral attack with a fastball/slider combo akin to what readers are used to seeing a low-slot righty do in the bullpen. Righty hitters flinch a lot against Denton. His slider often lacks depth but is still tough to discern from his fastball. He has middle relief projection with a shot to improve his slider's bat-missing ability in pro ball. He didn't break camp with an affiliate at the start of 2024, but I didn't see him pitch during the early part of extended spring training, so he may have an ailment of some kind.

news.post_title: Welcome to the 2025 Arizona Fall League
